mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATIONS ( NOTI_ID, USER_ID, MESSAGE, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, IS_READ, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTI_ID.NEXTVAL, #{noti.userId}, #{noti.message}, #{noti.targetType}, #{noti.targetId}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NOTI_ID as notiId, USER_ID as userId, MESSAGE, TARGET_TYPE as targetType, TARGET_ID as targetId, IS_READ as isRead, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt FROM NOTIFICATIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NOTIFICATIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 'N' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasUnread FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATIONS SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
